message:
rvdna-backend v0.1 — T1 warm mmap tier

Adds RvdnaT1Backend serving .rvdna v2 sections §2 (protein embeddings),
§3 (attention), and §4 (variant tensors) directly from mmap'd file
regions. Same BackendAdapter contract as T0, same witness derivation
via witness::rvdna_bundle (the trust chain anchor is unchanged across
tiers).

v0.1 takes section offsets directly from the operator at register_file
time — full v2 header parsing lands in a future point release without
changing the surface. Mmap is via memmap2; vector decode is zero-copy
via bytemuck::try_cast_slice (the one unsafe call site for Mmap::map
is locally allowed; #![deny(unsafe_code)] still holds at the crate
root).

Tests: 6 prior + 3 new (t1_backend_round_trips_through_rulake_cache,
t1_witness_matches_t0_for_same_inputs, generation_bump_invalidates_cache_t1)
= 9 passing. The witness-parity test is the load-bearing "two tiers,
one cache" property — if T0 and T1 ever produce different witnesses
for the same inputs, federation silently fragments.

Bench (criterion --quick, dim=384):
  256 vecs:  T0 6.90 µs  T1 7.79 µs  (~13% slower — comparable)
  1024 vecs: T0 39.4 µs  T1 41.2 µs  (~5% slower — comparable)
T1 hits the page cache after first touch, and ruLake's witness-
anchored cache means most production calls are hits anyway.

T0 backend untouched (v0.0.1 operators keep working). T2 cold-tier
remains v0.2 per ADR-007 §1.6 ship table.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

@@ -661,10 +690,12 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "ruvector-rulake-rvdna"
-version = "0.0.1"
+version = "0.1.0"

+ "bytemuck",
  "criterion",
  "hex",
+ "memmap2",
  "rulake",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",

@@ -10,22 +10,24 @@
 # Standalone Cargo package per ADR-001 (no root workspace; rulake from
 # crates.io v2.2 is the only ruLake-side dep).
 #
-# v0.0 ships T0 only. T1 (warm mmap protein embeddings + attention) and
-# T2 (cold lazy raw DNA + epigenomic series) land in v0.1 / v0.2 per the
-# ship table in docs/research/rvdna/integration-with-rulake.md §1.6.
+# v0.0 ships T0 only. v0.1 adds T1 (warm mmap tier — protein embeddings,
+# attention, variant tensors decoded from mmap'd `.rvdna` v2 sections
+# §2/§3/§4 — see `src/t1.rs` and `docs/research/rvdna/v2-spec.md`).
+# T2 (cold lazy raw DNA + epigenomic series) lands in v0.2 per the ship
+# table in docs/research/rvdna/integration-with-rulake.md §1.6.
 #
 # Build:  cargo build --release
 # Test:   cargo test --release
 
 [package]
 name        = "ruvector-rulake-rvdna"
-version     = "0.0.1"
+version     = "0.1.0"
 edition     = "2021"
 rust-version = "1.89"
 license     = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
 authors     = ["Ruvector Team"]
 repository  = "https://github.com/ruvnet/RuLake"
-description = "rvDNA v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — genomic substrate, hot-tier (T0) k-mer vectors via mmap (ADR-007)"
+description = "rvDNA v2 BackendAdapter for ruLake — genomic substrate, T0 hot-tier + T1 warm-mmap tier (ADR-007)"
 readme      = "README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
@@ -35,6 +37,8 @@ serde_json = "1.0"
 thiserror = "2.0"
 sha3 = "0.10"
 hex = "0.4"
+memmap2 = "0.9"
+bytemuck = { version = "1.16", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
@@ -48,6 +52,10 @@ harness = false
 name    = "cache_priming"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name    = "t1_pull_vectors"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level     = 3
 lto           = "thin"
